daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Scorpio. The universe is whispering that it's time to trust your gut and lean into whatever feels authentic. Your intuition is basically your superpower rn.
daily.love: Vulnerability is your love language today, and honestly? It hits different. Whether you're single or coupled up, letting people see the real you creates the deepest connections. No masks needed.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are absolutely unhinged (in the best way). This is the moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your unique perspective is literally what the world needs right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually listen. Maybe that's a walk, stretching, or just existing without your phone for a bit. Tune in to what feels nourishing—you deserve that care.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-discovery this week, Scorpio. It's giving introspective energy—perfect time to journal, reflect, and get real with yourself about what you actually want versus what you think you should want.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering softly in your corner. If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Someone might approach, but the real vibe is about falling in love with yourself first. That's the main character energy.
weekly.career: Your professional sector is activating ideas and communication. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or have those honest convos you've been avoiding. The universe has your back if you're authentic.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement this week—think yoga, walks, stretching. Energy-wise, you're integrating a lot internally. Rest isn't laziness; it's necessary recalibration. Hydrate and be kind to yourself.
